description_long: This is a freestanding, four-tier open shelving unit constructed primarily from metal. The frame consists of slender, rectangular metal tubing, providing structural support and a modern industrial aesthetic. Each of the four shelves is flat and solid, likely made from the same metal as the frame, and they are evenly spaced to accommodate a variety of items. The sides feature diagonal cross-bracing for added stability, and the open design allows for easy access from the front and sides. The finish is matte black, giving it a sleek, utilitarian look suitable for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces. There are no doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing its function as an accessible storage or display solution.
description: A matte black, four-tier open metal shelving unit with a minimalist industrial design and cross-braced sides. It is sturdy, accessible, and ideal for storage or display in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile and the depth of the shelves, with visible cross-bracing.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all four open shelves and the symmetrical, cross-braced frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the narrow profile and cross-bracing seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view, similar to the front, showing the open shelves and frame structure.
